## Summary

Describe the exact problem fixed or dependency updated.

## Change type

- [ ] dependency/library update
- [ ] package or installer fix
- [ ] script cleanup
- [ ] throughput fix
- [ ] documentation update
- [ ] CI/test fix
- [ ] security fix

## Checks

- [ ] `make test`
- [ ] `make packages-all` when package/script/install files changed
- [ ] README updated when behavior changed
- [ ] man page updated when CLI behavior changed
- [ ] docs updated when configuration, package, or workflow behavior changed

## Notes

Keep changes focused. Avoid unrelated rewrites or cosmetic-only edits.
